flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at California College of the Arts vs the 2004–2008 baseline (1.0k vs 1.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California College of the Arts rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($17.1k → $19.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California College of the Arts rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.3k → $60.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California College of the Arts rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.3k → $60.2k).
